title: Pauline Liu
description: Pauline Liu is the Senior Director for Human Resources of Duke Kunshan University. Pauline joined Duke Kunshan University in October 2012 as the founding director of human resources. text:
Pauline Liu
Pauline Liu is the Senior Director for Human Resources of Duke Kunshan University. Pauline joined Duke Kunshan University in October 2012 as the founding director of human resources. She oversees staff recruitment, compensation and benefits, international and domestic mobility, staff development, etc. Her office works very closely with the academic units and faculty to provide necessary support from HR. Under Pauline’s leadership, the DKU HR Office was awarded the Outstanding Office in Kunshan, and the university was awarded as Harmonious Labor Relations Employer in Kunshan.
Prior to joining Duke Kunshan University, Pauline had held HR leader positions at Xi’an Jiaotong Liverpool University, another joint venture university, from 2007 to 2012. She joined in its startup period and helped build and lead teams in the Human Resources Office. Before that, Pauline served as Human Resources Supervisor for Brady Technology (Suzhou) Co. Ltd, a US wholly invested company in Suzhou Industrial Park.
Pauline received a bachelor’s degree in Human Resources Management from Hehai University. She is a member of the American Chamber Shanghai and is active in its human resources association.
